title: How CDC Classifies Flu Severity each Season in the United States | Influenza (Flu) | CDC
text:
g this timeframe were related to COVID-19. The number of pneumonia and influenza (P&I) combined deaths increased during the pandemic, but this increase is unlikely to reflect flu activity. To avoid bias, counts of NCHS ICD-coded flu deaths were used instead of P&I deaths to calculate mortality thresholds and assess severity.
